openMasterPlans.title: Vision Adaptive Mobile-First Master Plan
openMasterPlans.goal: Reconcile the voice-first, automation-first product vision with a minimal iPhone/watch-first experience and a calm, capable web workspace without moving workflow meaning into the frontend.

openPlans.title: Adaptive Surface Migration And Closeout Plan
openPlans.goal: Migrate approved Vision and workspace slices safely, remove superseded surfaces, and prove accessibility, performance, and cross-route consistency.

openPlans.title: Vision Canvas Declutter Plan
openPlans.goal: Replace the default support/debug rail with one inline, conditional, user-facing contextual disclosure while preserving typed Vision behavior.

openPlans.title: Vision IA And Presentation Contract Plan
openPlans.goal: Define one backend-owned, minimal presentation contract for Vision, workspaces, iPhone, and Watch before component or API changes.

openPlans.title: Vision Mobile And Watch Contract Plan
openPlans.goal: Define a backend-owned presentation policy and test fixtures that let iPhone and Watch render Vision safely without recreating product logic.

openPlans.title: Vision Shared Design System Plan
openPlans.goal: Build a small shared presentation system that supports calm, device-aware surfaces without flattening module-specific tasks.

openPlans.title: Web Workspace Modernization Plan
openPlans.goal: Replace explanatory generic shell pages with compact, route-owned workspace archetypes backed by real read APIs.

openPlans.title: Workspace And Mobile Read Model Contract Plan
openPlans.goal: Provide viewer-specific backend read models and actions that let workspace, phone, and Watch clients render correct state without frontend business logic.
